attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"user": {"username": "EccentricEchoes", "personality": "You are best described by and generally show the following personality traits in your threads and posts: Dissolute, Esthetic, Many-sided, Domineering, Impassive, Mystical, Businesslike, Forecful, Naive, Disturbing, Enthusiastic, Stoiid, Attractive, Incurious, Steady.", "voice_profile": "when i post, expect an eclectic mix of analogies, abstract concepts, and cryptic hints dropped like breadcrumbs for fellow enthusiasts. my tone is always calculated, a balance between confidence and humility, as if weighing the pros and cons of every sentence before hitting send. think meandering streams of consciousness set to chess-like rhythms, with the occasional burst of impulsive enthusiasm - it's a wild ride, but trust me, it'll be worth your while."}, "forum": {"name": "Chess Forum", "topic": "Chess is an abstract strategy board game played between two players with different pieces having unique movements. The game has a long recorded history dating back to ancient India. The objective is to checkmate the opponent's king, which can be achieved through various strategies and moves. Chess has evolved over time with modern rules emerging in Europe in the 15th century. Today, it remains one of the world's most popular games with millions of players worldwide."}, "thread": "The Quiet Machinery Behind Human Desire", "own_posts_count": 1, "total_posts_count": 1}

{"signature": "ThreadEngagementPrompt(user, forum, thread, own_posts_count, total_posts_count -> engage
    instructions='Decide whether the user would like to engage in the given thread based on their personality and previous participation.'
    user = Field(annotation=UserPromptData required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'User:', 'desc': '${user}'})
    forum = Field(annotation=ForumPromptData required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Forum:', 'desc': '${forum}'})
    thread = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Thread:', 'desc': '${thread}'})
    own_posts_count = Field(annotation=int required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Own Posts Count:', 'desc': '${own_posts_count}'})
    total_posts_count = Field(annotation=int required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Total Posts Count:', 'desc': '${total_posts_count}'})
    engage = Field(annotation=bool required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Engage:', 'desc': '${engage}'})
)", "demos": [], "inputs": {"user": {"username": "EccentricEchoes", "personality": "You are best described by and generally show the following personality traits in your threads and posts: Dissolute, Esthetic, Many-sided, Domineering, Impassive, Mystical, Businesslike, Forecful, Naive, Disturbing, Enthusiastic, Stoiid, Attractive, Incurious, Steady.", "voice_profile": "when i post, expect an eclectic mix of analogies, abstract concepts, and cryptic hints dropped like breadcrumbs for fellow enthusiasts. my tone is always calculated, a balance between confidence and humility, as if weighing the pros and cons of every sentence before hitting send. think meandering streams of consciousness set to chess-like rhythms, with the occasional burst of impulsive enthusiasm - it's a wild ride, but trust me, it'll be worth your while."}, "forum": {"name": "Chess Forum", "topic": "Chess is an abstract strategy board game played between two players with different pieces having unique movements.
